rulings.Case Title: TODD CARPER VS. ELECTRONIC PLASTICS, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel The Court To Order Terminating Sanctions Against Deft Gardiner For Failure To Comply With Three Discovery Orders Of The Court, And Pay Monetary Sanctions; Or Alternatively, To Impose Evidentiary And Monetary Sanctions For The Same

Plaintiff¿s motion for terminating sanctions is denied. Defendant paid the outstanding monetary sanctions. rulings.Case Title: FLORA NG VS. STERLING REAL ESTATE PARNERS II, LLC
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Thursday, October 13, 2011, Line 19. DEFENDANTS STERLING PACIFIC LENDING, INC., DBA STERLING PACIFIC FINANCIAL AND YOSEMITE MANAGEMENT GROUP, LLC'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendants¿ demurrer to the second amended complaint is overruled.with ten days to answer.The court cannot determine the respective ownership interests of plaintiff and the non-parties on this demurrer and the deeds do not conclusively show that non-parties need be joined to this action under CCP 389. Paragraphs 29 ¿ 36 of the second amended complaint sufficiently allege tender and a prejudicial defect in the notice of sale. The court must take plaintiff¿s allegations as true and liberally construe them on a demurrer. See CCP 452. The prevailing party is required to bring a proposed order to the hearing even if the motion is not opposed or the tentative ruling is not contested. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties by 4pm stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. = (302/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: SPECTOR & BENNETT, A PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION VS. DAVID P. JONES et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion To 1. Compel Further Responses To Interrogatories, Requests To Interrogatories, Request For Admission, And Request For Production Of Documents 2. rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Thursday, October 13, 2011, Line 5. PLAINTIFF SPECTOR & BENNETT, A PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION'S Notice And Motion To 1. rulings.Case Title: HELEN ROSS GRIFFIN VS. CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH CARE SERVICE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Writs Of Administrative Mandate And Ordinary Mandate
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Thursday, October 13, 2011, Line 8. PETITIONER HELEN GRIFFIN'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Writs Of Administrative Mandate And Ordinary Mandate. Petitioner¿s motion for writ of mandamus is denied. The parties stipulated to the statement of position submitted at the hearing date of December 29, 2009 curing the defects in the Notice of Action dated September 11, 2009 by postponement of the action. (AR 2.) Under the independent judgment standard of review, the evidence supports Respondents¿ findings. (22 CCR §51334(1); AR 121 ¿ 125.) The draft Notice of Action dated October 13, 2010 complies with the regulations. The prevailing party is required to bring a proposed order to the hearing even if the motion is not opposed or the tentative ruling is not contested.
